item.title: Can a 250 mph Museum Plane Fly Again?
item.description: A look at whether a 250 mph museum plane could fly again after 20 years. The video focuses on aviation, restoration, and the story behind the aircraft. What would it take to bring it back?

media:content.media:title: Can a 250 mph Museum Plane Fly Again?
media:content.media:description: A look at whether a 250 mph museum plane could fly again after 20 years. The video focuses on aviation, restoration, and the story behind the aircraft. What would it take to bring it back?

item.title: Affordable Private Jets: Top 10 Under $75K
item.description: Explore ten affordable private jets that can be found for under $75,000, proving that aircraft ownership may be more accessible than many people think.

media:content.media:title: Affordable Private Jets: Top 10 Under $75K
media:content.media:description: Explore ten affordable private jets that can be found for under $75,000, proving that aircraft ownership may be more accessible than many people think.

item.title: Selling All In: The Big Plane Acquisition
item.description: A look at a big plane acquisition and the decision behind selling all in. The video focuses on aviation, commentary, and the story around the purchase. What would you do in that situation?

media:content.media:title: Selling All In: The Big Plane Acquisition
media:content.media:description: A look at a big plane acquisition and the decision behind selling all in. The video focuses on aviation, commentary, and the story around the purchase. What would you do in that situation?

item.title: Restoring Elvis Presley's Private Jet
item.description: A look at the restoration of Elvis Presley's private jet, with aviation details and commentary on bringing the aircraft back to life. What stands out most about this classic plane?

media:content.media:title: Restoring Elvis Presley's Private Jet
media:content.media:description: A look at the restoration of Elvis Presley's private jet, with aviation details and commentary on bringing the aircraft back to life. What stands out most about this classic plane?

item.title: Rare Planes and History in an Abandoned Hangar
item.description: Step inside an abandoned hangar filled with rare aircraft, forgotten stories, and remarkable pieces of aviation history. Every corner reveals a glimpse into a past that has been quietly waiting to be rediscovered.

media:content.media:title: Rare Planes and History in an Abandoned Hangar
media:content.media:description: Step inside an abandoned hangar filled with rare aircraft, forgotten stories, and remarkable pieces of aviation history. Every corner reveals a glimpse into a past that has been quietly waiting to be rediscovered.

item.title: Clear Prop at an Abandoned Plane
item.description: An abandoned aircraft sits untouched as preparations begin to see if there's still life left in it. With a careful prop check and a bit of optimism, the question remains: can this forgotten machine fly again?

media:content.media:title: Clear Prop at an Abandoned Plane
media:content.media:description: An abandoned aircraft sits untouched as preparations begin to see if there's still life left in it. With a careful prop check and a bit of optimism, the question remains: can this forgotten machine fly again?
